name: Zhejiang Zoenn Design Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Zoenn Design Co., Ltd., a footwear design company, designs, develops, and sells shoes in China. It offers men's, women's and children's shoes and other footwear design services; and luggage, clothing, household supplies, fashion accessories, and other fashion design products and services. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Wenzhou, China.
